rows: May get wrong number of customer if exist customer without orders.

SELECT SUM(T1.TotalAmount) 
FROM Orders AS T1 
JOIN Customer AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID 
WHERE YEAR(T1.OrderDate) = 2025
SELECT SUM(T1.TotalAmount) FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Customer AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.OrderDate) = '2025'
Show the top 5 products by revenue.
GROUP BY product, SUM(revenue), ORDER BY revenue DESC, LIMIT 5.
Five rows sorted by revenue descending.
